title: Modernization Process Model v26.02.06
text:
The SAF/AQXP Strategic Change Management team updated the Modernization Process Model to version 26.02.06. This version of the model includes two new documents. DoDI 4151.19 Serialized Item Management for Life-Cycle Management and a SAF/AQ Memorandum that renames SAF/AQD and SAF/AQR to SAF/AQT. This version of the model includes updated documents for AFI 63-140 Aircraft Structural Integrity Program, DAFI 90-160 Publications and Forms, and DoWI 5025.01 DOW Issuances Program. Please refer to the Document Changes page for a full list of documents.
If you have any questions, comments, or recommendations please use the Contact Us page.
